stages.spec:
## Why this will be good
Users browsing the homepage in Chinese or Russian currently hit jarring English fragments (Why Choose Us, Our Services, Off Plan, AI-Powered) that break trust in a real-estate platform where price/trust signals matter. This closes the last visible gaps on the two locales most likely to produce buyers. Production-ready: values map to real keys already rendered by existing components (no code paths added, no new keys, no states to handle). Benchmark: Bayut/PropertyFinder's localized homepages — every badge, every label is translated, no half-English sections.

## Scope
Edit ONLY `messages/zh.json` and `messages/ru.json`. No component changes. No new or removed keys. No changes to `messages/en.json` or `messages/ar.json`.

## Required edits — messages/zh.json (Simplified Chinese)
Replace the values of these existing keys (currently English) with natural Simplified Chinese. All are under `home.sections.*`:

1. `home.sections.stats.label` — currently `Why Choose Us` → translate to Simplified Chinese (short label, badge-style). Suggested: 为何选择我们
2. `home.sections.stats.titleItalic` — currently `Agency in Dubai` → translate. Suggested: 迪拜中介 (to pair naturally with the preceding title fragment as rendered; DEV may adjust phrasing to read correctly when concatenated with sibling `stats.title` — check how the component composes them)
3. `home.sections.whatWeOffer.title` — currently `Our Services` → Suggested: 我们的服务
4. `home.sections.whatWeOffer.titleItalic` — currently `Solutions` → Suggested: 解决方案
5. `home.sections.services.titleMobile` — currently `Our Services` → Suggested: 我们的服务
6. `home.sections.services.titleItalic` — currently `Care` → Suggested: 关怀 or 服务 (pair naturally with the sibling title)
7. `home.sections.services.marketing` — currently `Marketing` → Suggested: 营销
8. `home.sections.services.maintenance` — currently `Maintenance` → Suggested: 维护 (or 物业管理 if context is property-management — check how this string is rendered; if it appears alongside 营销/销售 as a service category, 维护 or 维修保养 is the right register)
9. `home.sections.services.popular` — currently `Popular` → Suggested: 热门
10. `home.sections.aiBanner.label` — currently `AI-Powered` → Suggested: AI驱动 (concise, badge-friendly; `AI` is acceptable as industry loanword in Chinese tech UI)
11. `home.sections.aiBanner.live` — currently `Live` → Suggested: 实时 (for a live-data badge) — DEV: confirm by checking the component; if it's a live-stream indicator use 直播, but market/AI banner context almost always = 实时
12. `home.sections.offPlan.label` — currently `期房` (already Chinese, IS FINE) → VERIFY unchanged. (Planner listed this but it's already translated.)
13. `home.sections.offPlan.offPlan` — currently `期房` (already Chinese, IS FINE) → VERIFY unchanged.

Note on items 12 and 13: current values in zh.json are already `期房` (Chinese). Planner flagged them out of caution. DEV should verify they are correct Simplified Chinese for off-plan property (they are) and leave them as-is if already translated. If DEV disagrees with the existing translation, 期房 is the industry-standard term for off-plan — keep it.

**Net: 11 strings need translating in zh.json, not 13.** Planner's list was a superset; trust the actual current values.

## Required edits — messages/ru.json (Russian)

1. `home.sections.offPlan.label` — currently `Off Plan` → replace with `Новостройки` (consistent with `nav.offPlan` and other ru.json off-plan keys)
2. `home.sections.offPlan.offPlan` — currently `Off-Plan` → replace with `Новостройки`
3. `marketDashboard.title` — currently the fragment `недвижимости Дубая` → replace with `Панель управления` (this key is rendered standalone as a heading meaning Dashboard; the English key is `Dashboard`, so the Russian must be a complete standalone heading, not a possessive fragment)

## Acceptance criteria
- `messages/zh.json` and `messages/ru.json` are valid JSON (no trailing commas, balanced braces, valid UTF-8).
- Key count in both files is IDENTICAL to the pre-edit file (no additions, no removals). Verify with `jq` or Python: number of leaf keys before = number after.
- For zh.json: after edit, none of the 11 target keys contain ASCII-only Latin text (allowance: `AI` inside `AI驱动` is acceptable as an industry loanword; no other English words allowed in those 11 values).
- For ru.json: the 3 target keys contain only Cyrillic (plus spaces/punctuation). No `Off Plan` or `Off-Plan` strings remain.
- Run `grep -n "Off Plan\|Off-Plan" messages/ru.json` → must return zero matches.
- Run a grep/jq scan over the full zh.json confirming no unintended new English strings were introduced. Excluded proper nouns per planner: Binayah, WhatsApp, AED, ROI, RERA, DLD, ORN, Marina Gate, FAQ, English, Re:, URLs, email addresses. The remaining known-acceptable English in zh.json (demo valuation labels, etc.) should be unchanged.
- `npm run build` (or at minimum `next build` type-check / JSON parse) must still succeed. Locale files are imported at build — a syntax error fails the whole build.
- Commit message: `fix(i18n): complete zh + ru translation gaps on homepage badges and marketDashboard`

## Gotchas (from planner — respect these)
- `offPlan.label` and `offPlan.offPlan` serve different UI purposes (section badge vs. property-type badge). In zh they're already both `期房` — leave as-is unless DEV finds a rendering reason to differ. In ru both become `Новостройки`.
- `aiBanner.label` and `aiBanner.live` are UI badge labels — keep translations concise (2-4 characters ideal) so they don't break the badge pill width.
- `marketDashboard.title` is rendered standalone. It MUST read as a complete heading on its own. `недвижимости Дубая` is a grammatical fragment ("of Dubai's real estate") — this is the exact bug being fixed. `Панель управления` is the complete standalone equivalent of Dashboard.
- Do not touch any other keys in either file, even if they look imperfect. Scope is strictly these 14 string values (11 zh + 3 ru).
- Do NOT add new keys, even if a sibling key seems missing — planner explicitly scoped this out.

## Files to touch
- `messages/zh.json`
- `messages/ru.json`

## Files NOT to touch
- Any `.tsx` or `.ts` file
- `messages/en.json`
- `messages/ar.json`
- Any config, package.json, lockfile

## DEV workflow
1. Open `messages/zh.json`, locate each of the 11 target keys under `home.sections.*`, replace the English value with the Chinese translation. Keep JSON formatting (indentation, trailing-comma style) identical to surrounding lines.
2. Open `messages/ru.json`, edit the 3 keys.
3. Validate both files parse as JSON (`python3 -c 'import json; json.load(open("messages/zh.json"))'` and same for ru).
4. Run final greps listed in acceptance criteria.
5. Commit.

No UI verification needed beyond ensuring the build passes — these are string-for-string swaps in keys that are already wired and rendered.

plannerOutput.taskSummary: Fix translation completeness in zh.json and ru.json: translate 13 surviving English strings in zh.json to Simplified Chinese, replace 2 English Off Plan strings in ru.json with Новостройки, and correct the ru.json marketDashboard.title fragment to Панель управления. No component changes, no new keys, no ar.json changes.
confirmedScope: messages/zh.json: translate home.sections.stats.label, home.sections.stats.titleItalic, home.sections.whatWeOffer.title, home.sections.whatWeOffer.titleItalic, home.sections.services.titleMobile, home.sections.services.titleItalic, home.sections.services.marketing, home.sections.services.maintenance, home.sections.services.popular, home.sections.aiBanner.label, home.sections.aiBanner.live, home.sections.offPlan.label, home.sections.offPlan.offPlan — all to correct Simplified Chinese
messages/ru.json: replace home.sections.offPlan.label and home.sections.offPlan.offPlan (currently English Off Plan / Off-Plan) with Новостройки
messages/ru.json: correct marketDashboard.title from fragment недвижимости Дубая to Панель управления
designDecisions: zh.json: use natural Simplified Chinese real-estate industry vocabulary consistent with surrounding translations (e.g. 期房 for off-plan, 物业管理 for property management)
ru.json Off Plan: use Новостройки — consistent with nav.offPlan and other existing ru.json keys
ru.json FAQ label: leave as FAQ — internationally recognised abbreviation, no change
ar.json email placeholders (you@example.com, you@email.com): leave as-is — email addresses are universally understood
ValuationCTA and ValuationBanner hardcoded demo labels (Avg AED/sqft, Fair value, Accurate to ±3%): leave as-is — static sample numeric labels that are locale-agnostic
ru.json marketDashboard.title: correct to Панель управления to match the English key meaning (Dashboard)
constraints: Do not change messages/en.json (source of truth)
Do not add or remove any keys — only fix values of existing keys

After editing, verify zero remaining English-only strings in zh.json and ru.json (excluding proper nouns: Binayah, WhatsApp, AED, ROI, RERA, DLD, ORN, Marina Gate, FAQ, English, Re:, URLs, email addresses)
outOfScope: No ValuationCTA or ValuationBanner wiring to i18n
gotchas: The two zh.json offPlan keys serve different purposes: offPlan.label is the section label badge (e.g. Off Plan), offPlan.offPlan is the property type badge — both need Chinese equivalents but they may have slightly different phrasing if needed
home.sections.aiBanner.label (AI-Powered) and home.sections.aiBanner.live (Live) are UI badge labels — Chinese equivalents should be concise and badge-friendly
marketDashboard.title in ru.json: the component reads this key standalone so it must read as a complete standalone heading, not a fragment
Use grep after edits to confirm no unintended English strings remain in the changed files

devReport.summary: Translated 11 English strings in zh.json to Simplified Chinese; fixed 2 off-plan keys and marketDashboard title in ru.json

designBrief.direction: no aesthetic direction needed for this scope — pure JSON content editing, no UI changes

selfGrade.evidence: messages/zh.json: stats.titleItalic = '机构' (pairs with title '迪拜获奖房产' → '迪拜获奖房产机构')
messages/zh.json: services.titleItalic = '关怀' (pairs with title '全面房产' → '全面房产关怀')
messages/zh.json: services.maintenance = '维护' (desc already references 维修保养, consistent register)
messages/zh.json: aiBanner.label = 'AI驱动' (AI loanword acceptable per spec)
messages/zh.json: aiBanner.live = '实时' (confirmed real-time context from sibling sublabel '实时分析')

selfGrade.action: zh.json: verify offPlan.label and offPlan.offPlan already Chinese (期房)
selfGrade.evidence: messages/zh.json: both offPlan keys = '期房', unchanged

selfGrade.action: ru.json: replace home.sections.offPlan.label (Off Plan) with Новостройки
ru.json: fix marketDashboard.title (fragment недвижимости Дубая) to Панель управления

devReport.notes: One pre-existing out-of-scope English string remains: ru.json `.pulse.offPlan = 'Off-Plan'` — spec explicitly says do not touch keys outside the 14 in scope. grep for Off Plan hits this untouched key. Flagged for PM awareness but not fixing per scope constraint.

summary: zh.json: 11 English strings translated to Simplified Chinese (stats, services, aiBanner sections). ru.json: offPlan label/badge fixed to Новостройки (×2), marketDashboard.title corrected to Панель управления. Deployed and READY on Vercel.
